name: BIM Birlesik Magazalar A.S.
summary: BIM Birlesik Magazalar A.S., together with its subsidiaries, operates retail stores in Turkey, Morocco, and Egypt. Its stores sell approximately 750 items, including meat, breakfast and dairy, legumes and bakery, and personal care products, as well as beverages, snacks and sweets, fruits and vegetables, frozen foods, and cleaning supplies. As of March 05, 2020, the company operated 8,348 stores. BIM Birlesik Magazalar A.S. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
